mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sale_record WHERE sale_num = #{saleNum} AND sale_status = 'PAID'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sale_record WHERE sale_num = #{saleNum} AND sale_status = 'CANCELED'
SELECT sale_serl_num , sale_num , course_id , student_id , amount , sale_status , occurred_at , created_at FROM sale_record WHERE sale_num = #{saleNum} AND sale_status = 'PAID'
SELECT sale_serl_num , sale_num , course_id , student_id , amount , sale_status , occurred_at , created_at FROM sale_record WHERE sale_num = #{saleNum} AND sale_status = 'CANCELED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sale_record ( sale_num, student_id, amount, sale_status, occurred_at, course_id ) VALUES ( #{saleNum}, #{studentId}, #{amount}, #{saleStatus}, #{occurredAt}, #{courseId} )
